security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* https://api.github.com https://github.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.githubusercontent.com; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.longDescription: TOAD spawns and coordinates multiple coding-agent CLIs (Claude, Codex, Gemini) into structured teams with risk-policy gates, durable event sourcing, and a desktop dashboard.
